name: J1939AppTxIndication
title: J1939AppTxIndication
syntax: dword J1939AppTxIndication( long ecuHandle, long txPG, long source, long dest );
description: Indicates that a PG has been sent successfully. The function for determining the actual sending time can be useful, especially in the case of a fragmented transfer or higher bus load. Use the function J1939GetRxData() to get the data bytes of the parameter group.
